build: LIVE prod main@59df732 (PR-1 flags ON in production)
claim: A stale-complete stuck student COMPLETES the paired review on the live build and ADVANCES (csd increments); not re-stranded. Reproduced on two independent sandbox accounts.
keyFinding: csd advances on review COMPLETION regardless of score (both samples scored 17% / 5-of-30 and still advanced) — matches the handoff spec: the review is a formality that completes the anchor day; completion, not score, unsticks the student.
reviewTestKind: mcq (/mcqtest/) — 30 questions, choice cards button[class*='min-h-']; NOT the typed test. (Earlier r33/r33v2 INCONCLUSIVE runs were a driver gap: assumed typed inputs + a reach-loop that clicked 'Take Test' instead of the modal's 'Start Test'.)

samples.state: mutated across driver-shakedown runs (still parked pre-submit at MCQ)

notes: twi did NOT change on either account (review path introduces no new words — expected; only the anchor DAY completes and csd increments).
score is 17% because the harness clicks the first choice card each question (completion probe, not a correctness probe). Advance is independent of score, which is the PR-1 design.
SANDBOX ONLY — never 26SM. No src/functions/rules/flags touched this round (flags already live in prod).
